config_note: Knowledge tasks dispatch by explicit stage_key columns. Uvicorn web processes run with TASK_WORKER_AUTOSTART=0, and scripts/backend_watchdog.sh starts standalone task_worker_main processes. worker_process_slots caps the standalone worker process count unless TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES overrides it; each process hot-reloads this JSON every 5s. worker_lanes_per_process=10 with 20 slots gives 200 knowledge execution entrances, a balanced Mac Studio profile after the 24-process profile pushed CPU too high. worker_total_memory_limit_mb=73728 lets the worker group use up to about 72GB RSS before watchdog restart, aligning with a 96GB machine target of roughly 75% memory pressure while relying on DB-backed queue recovery. claim_lock_scope=process serializes only the short DB claim section inside each worker process; task execution remains concurrent, but idle lanes no longer stampede the queue table. PostgreSQL row locks plus optional per-stage advisory xact locks still prevent duplicate hot-claim pressure. stage_concurrency caps individual DAG nodes; lane_concurrency caps resource groups such as local_preprocess, model_analysis, and relation_build; stage_dispatch_order chooses which node queue to drain first inside those resource constraints, so source_validate can act as the fast root gate without flattening everything into one global priority. Changing TASK_WORKER_PROCESSES, worker_process_slots, worker_total_memory_limit_mb, or DB pool env values requires backend restart.
